sessions.summary: Priya reviewed her monthly finances after salary credit and committed to cutting food delivery spend in half and transferring ₹30,000 to her house fund on the 25th of the month.
commitments: Cut food delivery spending in half this month (target: ~₹5,845)
Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on the 25th of the month
insights: Total committed monthly bills are ₹46,500 (Rent ₹25,000, SIP ₹10,000, Internet+Mobile ₹3,500, Credit Card ₹8,000)
Food delivery was the single largest discretionary expense last month at ₹11,690 across 8 orders
Last month's shopping spend was ₹8,000 on Myntra and Amazon
Has a house down payment goal of ₹15 lakh in 2 years, requiring ~₹50,000/month in savings
Has a dedicated house fund with savings already accumulated toward the ₹15 lakh goal
